steps.t: The other children might know where Periwinkle has gone. They're all playing near the Elbow's Bend Inn.
Gildor is waiting for you by Tighfield's western gate. You should discuss what you've discovered with him.
Gildor has suggested regrouping outside the ruins of Tham Amothir, to the south-west of Tighfield.
You've found Gildor outside Tham Amothir. You should talk to him to decide on what to do next.
